title: Cozy Floral Filipino Unwaxed Lime Grilled Skewers
description: A creamy and floral dish featuring unwaxed limes grilled on skewers for a cozy Filipino flavor profile that's suitable for vegetarians.

ingredients.name: 1 lime
ingredients.notes: Ensure limes are unwaxed to meet dietary requirements.

instructions: Slice the bell peppers, onion thinly and chop cherry tomatoes into halves.
Mix together sliced vegetables, minced garlic and lime juice in a large bowl.
Place skewers on a flat surface and alternate vegetable slices. Place skewer ends under water to prevent burning while grilling.
Grill the skewers for about 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally until vegetables are tender and lightly charred on all sides. Keep a close eye as limes can burn quickly.
Allow skewers to cool slightly before serving.
